mapper.update: update t_repair set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where repair_id = #{repairId}

UPDATE t_repair SET deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} WHERE module_type = #{moduleType} AND module_id in
#{item}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_repair WHERE module_id = #{moduleId} AND module_type = #{moduleType}
mapper.select: SELECT repair_id FROM t_repair WHERE deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} AND repair_plant_id = #{repairPlantId}
